message:
feat(fwc): add event deduplication, TOML rule file loading, and Duplicate outcome

Reactive rules now support replay-safe event deduplication and file-based
rule management:

Event deduplication:
- IncomingEvent gains an optional event_id field for stable upstream
  identifiers (e.g., webhook delivery IDs, message IDs)
- New dedup_identity() method returns a stable key: uses the upstream
  event_id when present ("id:<event_id>"), otherwise derives a
  deterministic blake3 hash over connector+event_type+data fields
  ("hash:<hex>") so retries of the same event collapse to one key
- New DeduplicationLog tracks seen events with a configurable TTL
  window and max capacity, providing is_duplicate()/record() API
- ReactiveEngine integrates dedup checking: events seen within the
  TTL window return ExecutionOutcome::Duplicate without re-executing
  the rule action

Rule file loading:
- New load_rules_from_dir() scans a directory for *.toml files and
  deserializes each into a ReactiveRule, collecting parse errors
  without aborting the entire load
- New load_rules_from_file() loads a single TOML rule definition

New ExecutionOutcome::Duplicate variant with Display impl returning
"duplicate".

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
